title: psychotria correae
intro: Psychotria correae, also known as the 'Guayabillo', is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria correae include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
